summary: Tested Wandel Reality scroll-driven SPA end-to-end. All 6 backend pytest tests pass (root, reach-out create full/min, 422 validations, list newest-first). Full frontend UI verified: preloader -> hero, all sections render with correct test ids (ateliers 3 cards, services 6, storytelling 6 fragments, team 11 cards, footer), reach form POST works and shows success toast + resets, booking fallback toast appears when REACT_APP_BOOKING_URL is empty, hero CTA scrolls to Ateliers, mobile menu opens and shows all nav links. No console errors, no broken images.

integration_issues.issue: Inputs have HTML5 `required` attribute, so submitting an empty form triggers the browser's native validation popup instead of the Sonner `toast.error('Please fill name, email, subject and body.')` defined in Reach.jsx. Functional outcome is still correct (no POST is sent), but the requested user-facing 'error toast' does not appear unless the required attribute is removed (and JS validation alone is relied on). Minor UX deviation only.

action_items: Optional: decide between HTML5 `required` (native popup) vs. JS-only validation with Sonner toast on the Reach form — currently both exist but the native popup wins. If a toast is the desired UX, drop `required` from <Field> inputs or change Field to render `noValidate` on the form.

Optional: data-testid `nav-ateliers` (and the rest of nav-*) is rendered twice (desktop + mobile drawer). Consider distinct ids (e.g., nav-ateliers-mobile) to avoid ambiguity in automation. Not a functional bug.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI `@app.on_event('shutdown')` — should migrate to lifespan handlers in future (non-blocking).
server.py allow_credentials=True together with allow_origins=['*'] (default when CORS_ORIGINS unset) is invalid per CORS spec and browsers may reject. Set CORS_ORIGINS explicitly when going to prod.
Frontend has two elements per nav link (desktop + mobile) sharing identical data-testid attributes — duplicates can cause flaky Playwright `is_visible` checks.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ prefixed reach_out documents in MongoDB via /api/reach-out during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://wandel-reality.preview.emergentagent.com/api is healthy. Reach-out POST works and persists to Mongo (db.reach_outs). Frontend uses Lenis smooth scroll + Framer Motion. Allow ~3.5s for preloader before any interaction. Mobile menu toggle has data-testid `nav-mobile-toggle`. Reach form `required` attributes block native submit so empty-state toast never fires (see frontend_issues).
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found. Only one minor UX deviation noted above (HTML5 required vs Sonner toast).
